title: MATANA 40 Small Clear Plastic Bowls (150 ml / 5 oz) – Reusable Mini Dessert Bowls for Dips, Sauces, Ice Cream & Trifles – Sturdy, Stackable Party Bowls
features: Ideal size for desserts & tastings (150 ml / 5 oz): Serve trifles, ice cream, jelly, yoghurt, puddings and fruit; or use as plastic ramekins for salsa, ketchup, mustard, chutney and other dips—perfect for tasting portions and kids’ snacks.

Reusable & washable: Made from food-grade PP (BPA-free) with smooth rims and a comfy grip. Designed for repeated use; a quick wash and they’re ready for the next round. No shattering, lighter than glass, and great for indoor or outdoor service.

Sturdy, stackable & space-saving: Rigid walls hold their shape, the flat base stays stable on buffet tables, and the nesting design keeps storage tidy—handy for caterers, picnics and small kitchens alike.

Crystal-clear presentation: The transparent finish makes colourful desserts and condiments pop, elevating grazing tables, canapé spreads and party buffets. Looks smart alongside the rest of your MATANA tableware.
Event-ready value pack: 40 mini bowls keep you covered for birthdays, weddings, BBQs, office parties, school fairs and everyday nibbling—convenient portions without bulky crockery.
description: Product Description Variety of Elegant Options Our tableware come in various sizes, shapes and easy serving of different food options. This is especially useful for events with many guests. Perfect for every occasion Whether it's weddings, birthdays, BBQs, picnics or garden parties, these elegant plastic tablewares are the ideal choice for adding a touch of class to any event. Raise a toast to unforgettable moments! Elegant Design The tableware are crystal clear and transparent, providing a visually appealing showcase for your food. Guests can see the layers and textures of your creations, enhancing the overall dining experience. Wash and Reuse Our clear tableware are reusable, making them a sustainable choice. After your event, cleaning them is a breeze – simply wash them with mild soap and warm water, and they're ready for your next gathering. Previous page Wedding Make your wedding venue a masterpiece with Matana's stunning tableware collection. Picnic Brighten up your picnic spread with our range of tableware Party Matana Plates and Bowls bring style, functionality, and elegance to your dining table.
